title: MON - Autonomous Source Code & Architecture Auditor
tagline: Clones repositories, analyzes backend architectures, and extracts technical metadata for code auditing
description: MON is an autonomous static analysis engine that clones source code to discover endpoints, APIs, forms, routes, and tech stacks. It utilizes custom parsers and exporters to build a comprehensive map of any application architecture.

visual.title: MON: The Autonomous Code Cloner & Architecture Scanner

skills.name: Code Architecture Discovery
skills.summary: Runs deep static analysis to discover APIs, endpoints, and form schemas in any cloned Python or JS project.

feedbackPrompts: How easily does MON integrate with your current CI/CD pipelines?
Are there other specific web frameworks or languages you want the parsers to support?
How accurate is the tech-stack discovery on legacy codebases?
